vocab.example: I diligently tended to my small patch of sunflowers every single afternoon after school.
My grandfather taught me how to cut back the dead leaves to help the rose bushes grow stronger.
I loved to root around in the soil with my bare hands to find earthworms while planting seeds.

vocab.meaning: đong, đo lường (lượng nước, phân bón)
vocab.example: I would carefully measure out the liquid fertilizer to ensure my tomatoes got the perfect amount of nutrients.
Once the seedlings were sturdy enough, my mother helped me pot them up into larger ceramic containers.

vocab.meaning: lan ra, lấn át, chiếm lĩnh (không gian)
vocab.example: We planted some mint, but it quickly began to take over the entire herb garden because it grows so fast.
One of my weekly chores was to pull out the stubborn weeds that competed with our vegetable plants.

vocab.meaning: tươi tỉnh lại, héo rũ rồi xanh tươi lại
vocab.example: It was amazing to see how the wilted lettuce would perk up almost instantly after a heavy rain.
I watched the small sapling slowly branch out until it eventually provided a bit of shade in our backyard.

vocab.meaning: bao bọc, che chắn (để bảo vệ cây)
vocab.example: During the surprisingly cold nights, we had to wrap up the delicate tropical plants in plastic sheets.
